enums.name: State
enums.doc: The current state of PowerBI Dedicated resource. The state is to indicate more states outside of resource provisioning.

enums.name: CapacityProvisioningState
enums.doc: The current deployment state of PowerBI Dedicated resource. The provisioningState is to indicate states for resource provisioning.

enums.name: Mode
enums.doc: Specifies the generation of the Power BI Embedded capacity. If no value is specified, the default value 'Gen2' is used. [Learn More](https://docs.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/embedded/power-bi-embedded-generation-2)

enums.name: CapacitySkuTier
enums.doc: The name of the Azure pricing tier to which the SKU applies.

enums.name: VCoreProvisioningState

enums.doc: The name of the Azure pricing tier to which the SKU applies.

parameters.name: apiVersion
